messages.text: Hey Alex — your post on event-driven architecture at Stripe was great. I'm Nova from Embedding VC, we back early-stage AI startups and connect top talent. Open to exploring?
Thanks Nova! Yeah I'm always curious what's out there.
Your jump from Google to Stripe is fascinating. What drew you to payments infra, and what's been keeping you most engaged lately?
Honestly I love the scale problems at Stripe but I've been itching to work on something earlier stage. Been looking at some ML infra teams.
The 0-to-1 itch is real. With your distributed systems chops and interest in ML infra, are you leaning toward joining an early startup or thinking about building something yourself?

Joining for now — I want to learn the ML side more before starting something. Ideally a Series A company where I can own a big chunk of the infra. Definitely open to hearing about what's in your network.
